name: Quick Beef Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cut green beans, drained (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef into a large frying pan.
2. Add onion and salt; cook until browned.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Stir in soup, green beans, and pepper.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole.
7. Spread mashed potatoes over the top.
8. Sprinkle with cheese.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
